The Warrens.description: Fog sits knee-deep in the alleys. Night Pits are quieter than usual.

Markets Infinite.description: The crowd heat and still air have produced an interesting smell in Taste of Worlds.

Sanctum Quarter.description: Fine acidic mist seeps from the Dome's upper vents.

Grand Forum.description: The Central Plaza is carrying every conversation to every other corner. Brokers are whispering.

Guild Spires.description: Good visibility from the upper Guild Spires. Someone's doing something on the roof.

Outer Wall.description: The Wall is weeping. Acid mist is pooling at the base of Gate District. Stay back.
